Overview
You want to go to Italy for university studies (University Admission)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You want to go to Italy for university studies (University Admission)

## Visa Fees

[ita > dza > en > Table:University studies (Admission to University) > Visa Fees 1]

VFS Global Service Charge

[ita > dza > en > Table:University studies (Admission to University) > Visa Fees 2]
- The applicable visa fees must be paid in cash or by CIB credit card according to the current Euro exchange rate above.
- A change without notice is possible.
- The visa fee exemption mainly concerns:
- Children under 6 years (short stay);
- Student visa applicants (short stay);
- Spouse of an Italian citizen;
- Researchers traveling within the European Union (short stay) for scientific research purposes.
- Service fees are non-refundable if the deletion is not processed 72H before appointment day
- The service charges are inclusive of VAT

## Documents Required
#Click here to download the list of required documents.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 60 days in certain cases; the processing time for a national visa, regulated
                                                                        by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for subordinate employment and 120 days for independent employment).

## Download Forms
Long Stay Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7npCjLWYg7CcsnSj8GUe9V/b70e0f4de1cc8c5e690749ea94f68570/long-stay-form.pdf)
Short Stay Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/yDcyIyQqldpn8yE3972vy/f8eedd641b7d932ed784eed146a7bd29/short-stay-form.pdf)
Tourist Invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/73eEjo4Y2LWoD2dj13SECX/6ea5ea20c02e1913488cb3cd41f79eb7/tourist-invitation.pdf)

## Overview
You are going to Italy for a tourist or family visit.

## Visa Fees

[ita > dza > en > Table:Tourist, family visit > Visa Fees 1]

VFS Global Service Charge

[ita > dza > en > Table:Tourist, family visit > Visa Fees 2]
- The applicable visa fees must be paid in cash or by CIB credit card according to the current Euro exchange rate above.
- A change without notice is possible.
- The visa fee exemption mainly concerns:
- Children under 6 years (short stay);
- Student visa applicants (short stay);
- Spouse of an Italian citizen;
- Family of EU citizens (spouse, ascendant, descendant);
- Researchers traveling within the European Union (short stay) for scientific research purposes.
- Service fees are non-refundable if the deletion is not processed 72H before appointment day
- The service charges are inclusive of VAT

## Documents Required
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1pdgN9Pcb0jhZ3z9jzZ4EI/6f3bf9136c1644a7fb4fe6fa504240fd/short-stay-tourism-checklist.pdf) to download the list of required documents.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 60 days in certain cases; the processing time for a national visa, regulated
                                                                        by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for subordinate employment and 120 days for independent employment).

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You wish to transit Italy for less than 24 hours before continuing your journey to a destination outside the Schengen territory. 
(Only if you hold a passport of one of these nationalities)
Please note: Algerian nationals do not require an airport transit visa.

## Visa Fees

[ita > dza > en > Table:Transit Visa (less than 24 hours) > Visa Fees 1]

VFS Global Service Charge

[ita > dza > en > Table:Transit Visa (less than 24 hours) > Visa Fees 2]
- The applicable visa fees must be paid in cash or by CIB credit card according to the current Euro exchange rate above.
- A change without notice is possible.
- The visa fee exemption mainly concerns:
- Children under 6 years (short stay);
- Student visa applicants (short stay);
- Spouse of an Italian citizen;
- Researchers traveling within the European Union (short stay) for scientific research purposes.
- Service fees are non-refundable if the deletion is not processed 72H before appointment day
- The service charges are inclusive of VAT

## Documents Required
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1HatA6CZrjZTJx43egnx0z/fb0ce7223fb864fb8c56e333e7780e18/airport-transit-checklist.pdf) to download the list of required documents.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3SdY5zjPrqpsPFOJk4g1Qb/4a86e4be229ad47c8235ed238e77ecff/fr-annexe-acte-autonome-cp.pdf) to download the harmonized list

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 60 days in certain cases; the processing time for a national visa, regulated
                                                                        by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for subordinate employment and 120 days for independent employment).

## Overview
You wish to travel to Italy for a sports competition and your stay will not exceed 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[ita > dza > en > Table:Sports Competition > Visa Fees 1]

VFS Global Service Charge

[ita > dza > en > Table:Sports Competition > Visa Fees 2]
- The applicable visa fees must be paid in cash or by CIB credit card according to the current Euro exchange rate above.
- A change without notice is possible.
- The visa fee exemption mainly concerns:
- Children under 6 years (short stay);
- Student visa applicants (short stay);
- Spouse of an Italian citizen;
- Researchers traveling within the European Union (short stay) for scientific research purposes.
- Service fees are non-refundable if the deletion is not processed 72H before appointment day
- The service charges are inclusive of VAT

## Documents Required
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6ZuK9yGKqZXcgz7WcYHUHi/c7c97370d4d117083ca20d7e5632cc09/sport-competition-checklist-updated.pdf) to download the list of required documents.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3SdY5zjPrqpsPFOJk4g1Qb/4a86e4be229ad47c8235ed238e77ecff/fr-annexe-acte-autonome-cp.pdf) to download the harmonized list

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 60 days in certain cases; the processing time for a national visa, regulated
                                                                        by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for subordinate employment and 120 days for independent employment).
